auth.name: Имя
auth.passwordHint: Минимум 8 символов: заглавная, строчная буква и цифра.

landing.title: Deploy. Ссылка. Готово.
landing.copy: Подключите репозиторий и получите публичную ссылку DreamX за минуты.
landing.readyCopy: Создайте аккаунт и опубликуйте первый сайт.
landing.statsTitle: Counters that move when the platform grows.
landing.testimonialsTitle: A practical platform for practical teams.

login.title: Login-only deploys
login.copy: Protected backend and frontend routes keep repository deploys behind verified user sessions.

logs.title: Live deploy logs
logs.copy: Build and deploy messages are persisted and streamed into terminal-style viewers.

urls.title: Public URLs
urls.copy: Each project receives a unique URL, with wildcard subdomain support on Linux.

admin.title: Private control panel
admin.copy: Separate privileged sessions, user management, audit trail, settings, logs, and announcements.

server.title: Server ready
server.copy: PostgreSQL schema, Redis queue support, PM2, Nginx, Caddy, HTTPS, and setup scripts.

analyze.title: Analyze project
analyze.copy: DreamX reads repository metadata, detects framework, and previews the build plan.

publish.title: Build and publish
publish.copy: Build commands run with timeouts, static output is copied, and the live URL becomes public.

free.name: Free
free.copy: For quick demos and portfolio projects.

pro.name: Pro
pro.copy: For teams that deploy more often.

ayla.name: Ayla, product designer
ayla.quote: DreamX turns client previews into a clean, repeatable workflow.

tural.name: Tural, frontend engineer
tural.quote: The deploy flow feels simple, but the admin controls are serious.

studio.name: Nara Studio
studio.quote: We can host small web projects without touching server config each time.

login.q: Can users deploy without logging in?
login.a: No. Repository validation and deploy endpoints require a valid user JWT and protected frontend route.

subdomains.a: Point wildcard DNS to the Linux server and use the provided Nginx or Caddy config.

postgres.a: Yes. Production uses the included PostgreSQL migration. Local development can use the file fallback.

https.a: The app includes Caddy and Nginx plus Certbot deployment guides for wildcard or domain HTTPS.

frameworks.q: Can I deploy React or Vue?
frameworks.a: Yes. DreamX detects package files, runs the build command, and publishes the output directory.

limits.a: Yes. Project limits, build timeout, maintenance mode, branding, and SMTP can be changed from settings.

logs.a: Deployment and admin logs are persisted and can also stream live over WebSocket.

domains.a: The deployment model supports clean slugs and wildcard subdomains, with reverse proxy examples included.

dashboard.title: Ваше deploy-пространство.
dashboard.workspaceCopy: Deploy slots, activity, usage, and onboarding live in one calm workspace.

deploy.githubDeployCopy: Connect GitHub or GitLab, choose one of your repositories, then analyze and publish it.
